question: What is the average number of items (sum of quantities) per completed order?

attempts.raw_response: {"sql": "SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_quantity), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS order_quantity FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.order_id)", "assumptions": ["gold replay"], "selected_tables": []}

candidate.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_quantity), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS order_quantity FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.order_id)

policy.normalized_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_quantity), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS order_quantity FROM orders AS o JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY o.order_id) LIMIT 200
